name: Moc
description: Map of Content — navigation and synthesis document organizing knowledge notes by topic. Hub → domain → topic hierarchy with core ideas, tensions, and traversal hints.

global.schema:
enum MocTier {
    HUB
    DOMAIN
    TOPIC
}

type MocEntry {
    id: OID!
    noteRef: String!
    contextPhrase: String!
    sortOrder: Int!
    addedAt: DateTime
    addedBy: String
}

type MocTensionEntry {
    id: OID!
    description: String!
    involvedRefs: [String!]!
    addedAt: DateTime
}

type MocState {
    title: String
    description: String
    orientation: String
    tier: MocTier
    coreIdeas: [MocEntry!]!
    tensions: [MocTensionEntry!]!
    openQuestions: [String!]!
    agentNotes: [String!]!
    parentRef: String
    childRefs: [String!]!
    noteCount: Int
    createdAt: DateTime
    updatedAt: DateTime
}
global.initialValue:
{
    "title": null,
    "description": null,
    "orientation": null,
    "tier": null,
    "coreIdeas": [],
    "tensions": [],
    "openQuestions": [],
    "agentNotes": [],
    "parentRef": null,
    "childRefs": [],
    "noteCount": 0,
    "createdAt": null,
    "updatedAt": null
}

operations.name: CREATE_MOC
operations.description: Initialize a new Map of Content
operations.schema:
input CreateMocInput {
    title: String!
    description: String!
    orientation: String!
    tier: MocTier!
    parentRef: String
    createdAt: DateTime!
}
operations.template: Initialize a new Map of Content

operations.name: UPDATE_ORIENTATION
UPDATE_DESCRIPTION
ADD_CORE_IDEA
operations.description: Add a note to Core Ideas with context phrase
operations.schema:
input AddCoreIdeaInput {
    id: OID!
    noteRef: String!
    contextPhrase: String!
    sortOrder: Int!
    addedAt: DateTime!
    addedBy: String
}
operations.template: Add a note to Core Ideas with context phrase

errors.name: DuplicateCoreIdeaError
errors.description: This note is already in Core Ideas

operations.name: UPDATE_CORE_IDEA
operations.description: Update a core idea's context phrase or order
operations.template: Update a core idea's context phrase or order

operations.name: REMOVE_CORE_IDEA
operations.description: Remove a note from Core Ideas
operations.template: Remove a note from Core Ideas

operations.name: REORDER_CORE_IDEAS
operations.description: Reorder core ideas by providing ordered IDs
operations.template: Reorder core ideas by providing ordered IDs

operations.name: ADD_TENSION
REMOVE_TENSION
operations.description: Remove a resolved or dissolved tension
operations.template: Remove a resolved or dissolved tension

operations.name: ADD_CHILD_MOC

errors.name: DuplicateChildMocError
errors.description: This child MOC is already linked
